race.comment: FIRST CHORUS (1) is off a let up having struggled when in the market at Flemington out to 1800m last time. That was only the second time she's missed the placings, expect she bounces back. A DIVA (3) perhaps didn't see out 2000m on a heavy track at Pakenham last time. Her 1600m form prior was rock solid for this and she draws perfectly for Bates. JAZZ AFFAIR (8) is going better than her form reads and should be at her top now fourth-up. Keeps Williams, who will be desperate to boot her up from the low draw and stalk them into it. ENNA'S DREAM (7) closed off nicely late in the slop at Warrnambool. Mile suits third-up and expecting her to be much closer at the turn this time.
